mediapackage.asset.Id.Docs: Unique identifier that you assign to the asset.

mediapackage.asset.PackagingGroupId.Docs: The ID of the packaging group associated with this asset.

mediapackage.asset.ResourceId.Docs: Unique identifier for this asset, as it's configured in the key provider service.

mediapackage.asset.SourceArn.Docs: The ARN for the source content in Amazon S3.

mediapackage.asset.SourceRoleArn.Docs: The ARN for the IAM role that provides AWS Elemental MediaPackage access to the Amazon S3 bucket where the source content is stored. Valid format: arn:aws:iam::{accountID}:role/{name}

mediapackage.asset.Tags.Docs: The tags to assign to the asset.
